overview.description: The WisdomTree Managed Futures Strategy Fund (WTMF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund is actively managed to provide positive returns in rising and falling markets. The fund seeks to emulate the returns of an index that takes long and short positions in currency, commodity, and Treasury futures. WTMF was launched on Jan 5, 2011 and is issued by WisdomTree.
